fields.description: Event start date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).
Event end date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).
Representative midpoint date for the event in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).
Event duration measured in whole days.
NERC region identifier associated with the event.
Spatial extent metric for the event (coverage in dataset-defined units).
Peak heat-wave temperature value in Kelvin.
Minimum cold-snap temperature value in Kelvin.
Gap in days between the current event end date and the next event start date within the same region.
Running cumulative stress index within each region-year, based on event temperature multiplied by duration.
Maximum event temperature observed for the region in that calendar year.
Maximum event duration observed for the region in that calendar year.
Year-over-year change in yearly maximum intensity within each region.
Year-over-year change in yearly maximum duration within each region.
